school.name: The Schoolhouse
school.description: Each teacher at the schoolhouse leads a different class in a different room. Work out who teaches what, and where.
clues: The class with Mona's period is immediately next to the member of the Scouts club's period.
The class with 83%'s period is lower than both Dunn's period and the class with Piper's period.
93%, Period 3, and Period 5 go with Ellis, Noah, and Piper, in some order.

Drama goes with exactly one of Ellis, Noah, or 83%.

The member of the Choir club's grade is higher than both Dunn's grade and the class in Period 1's grade.
83% goes with exactly two of Frost, Choir, and Period 5.

chess.name: The Chess Club
chess.description: Regulars at the chess club each swear by a different opening, a favourite tactic, and a prized set. Work out who plays what.
clues: The London player's placing is immediately next to the player who loves the Zugzwang's placing.

The player who loves the Gambit's rating is higher than both Magnus' rating and the player who placed 5th's rating.
1893 goes with exactly two of Nadia, Gambit, and 1st.
